candidates.why: Explicit D&A line exists above the financial section, but it is presented as a separate operating expense line and is not identified as COGS/cost of revenues/cost of goods specific. Given the selected COGS bucket and the need to avoid misallocating generic operating D&A to COGS, this should not be added to COGS separately.

This is a separate amortization-related operating row, but nothing in the label ties it specifically to COGS/cost of revenues. Conservative treatment is to avoid adding it to COGS and risking misclassification or double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible. The visible D&A rows appear generic operating items rather than clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A row above the financial section, shown separately from the selected SG&A component rows (Property administration, Central administration, External Expenses, Personnel Expenses, etc.). Because it appears at the same level rather than as a sub-component of those selected rows, it should be added separately to the XSGA bucket.

Potentially another amortisation-related operating row, but likely more granular than or overlapping with the broader 'Depreciation/Amortization' line. To avoid double counting, prefer the broader summary D&A row only.

variables.notes: Selected only the broader explicit D&A line as the separate operating add-back for SG&A. Excluded 'Amortization of Intangibles' under the summary-vs-components / avoid-double-counting rule.
